title: volumes: do not recurse when chowning
body:
keep the file ownership when chowning and honor the user namespace
mappings.

Closes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/7130

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *giuseppe* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [giuseppe] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

This breaks one of the BATS tests, but it's almost certainly because I had no idea what I was doing when I wrote the test. If this is truly the new desired behavior, please edit `test/system/070-build.bats` starting at line 218.
Oh, and if you're still around, there's no point in waiting for CI. It is going to hard-fail on this.
